questions.question: Infectious Diseases (Q001): A clinical concept related to antibiotic selection is assessed. Which option is MOST accurate?
questions.option_b: Correct statement consistent with antibiotic selection
questions.option_c: Incorrect mechanism or association for antibiotic selection
questions.option_d: Finding typical of a different condition than antibiotic selection
questions.explanation: The correct answer reflects standard undergraduate medical/dental knowledge for antibiotic selection.
